_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v20 Core build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05162026/v20_plan.txt §3. v20 forks v19 floors verbatim except for the two regressed axes ATE and RCM, whose floors are lifted to track the count_max 3500 -> 5500 bump documented in v20_plan.txt §2.1. The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

_provenance.rationale: v20 raises the per-template count_max ceiling for the Core build only (3500 -> 5500); ATE and RCM templates have no per-template Count: directive and were saturating the 3500 ceiling in v19. The two affected axis floors are bumped to track the realised v20 yield, not the projected linear scaling. v19 actuals (count_max=3500): ATE 16,967 / RCM 28,772. v20 measured actuals (count_max=5500): ATE 19,843 (+17%; substrate-bounded by intrusion-set x malware x technique enumeration) / RCM 44,651 (+55%; wider combinatorial space). v20 floors set to 18,500 (ATE) and 36,000 (RCM) — both ~5-10% under the realised yield to leave dedup headroom while still flagging regressions vs the v19 baselines (ATE 16,967, RCM 28,772). All other axes have explicit per-template Count: ceilings or substrate-bounded yields and carry v19 floors verbatim.

axes._note: Carried from v18.1 verbatim. v18 declared 13000 / floor 11700 over fragmented AB.RMS.{4,5} paraphrases. v18p1 consolidated to single-template AB.RMS.{4,5} Count: 600 each (matches v9_rms / v7); the post-dedup tail lands ~12.2K so the floor is set to 12000.

v20 delta vs v19. v19 actual under count_max=3500: 16,967 (target 13,000 / floor 12,500). v20 raises count_max -> 5500 (see v20_plan.txt §2.1). ATE templates are substrate-bounded (intrusion-set x malware x technique enumeration) and only scaled +17% to 19,843 in v20 (vs RCM's +55%; not the optimistic linear projection). Target raised to 20,000; floor raised to 18,500 to keep ~7% headroom on the realised v20 yield while still strictly above the v19 baseline (16,967) so any future regression flags.

Carried from v18.1 verbatim. AB.VSP.{1..4} and V.CPE.{1..4} capped at Count: 1500 each (matches v10's 4*1500 + 4*1500 = 12K shape that posted VSP 86.7); the post-dedup tail lands ~6K so the floor is set to 5400 (10% headroom).

v20 delta vs v19. v19 actual under count_max=3500: 28,772 (target 10,000 / floor 9,000). v20 raises count_max -> 5500 (see v20_plan.txt §2.1); v20 realised actual 44,651 (+55%; RCM templates have wide combinatorial space and benefit fully from the bump). Target raised to 44,000; floor raised to 40,000 to keep ~10% headroom on the realised v20 yield while still strictly above the v19 baseline (28,772) so any future regression flags.

Carried from v18.1 verbatim. v18p1 dropped AB.MCQ.EXT.{MITRE,SEC,GLOSS}.1 and reverted to scenario-only AB.MCQ.{1..6} + JS.MCQ.{1,2,5} (matches v8small CKT 77.6 ~6K shape). Three new scenario-shape templates AB.MCQ.7 (mw->ap; Count 800), AB.MCQ.8 (grp->mw; Count 500), AB.MCQ.9 (sub->parent; Count 800) were added in v18p1 to clear the 6000 floor.
